name: zzem-orchestrator-root
description: Root scripts for zzem-orchestrator. Subpackages (sprint-gallery, sprint-orchestrator/evals) own their own dependencies.

scripts.de-eval: cd sprint-orchestrator/evals && pnpm exec tsx scripts/run-de-eval.ts
scripts.de-eval:snapshot: cd sprint-orchestrator/evals && pnpm exec tsx scripts/snapshot-baseline.ts
